display_name: Seedream 5.0 Lite is ByteDance's latest text-to-image model with greater intelligence. Seedream 5.0 Lite can also take in  multiple images as references and combine them together or edit them to retur
description:
Seedream 5.0 Lite is ByteDance's latest text-to-image model with greater intelligence. Seedream 5.0 Lite can also take in  multiple images as references and combine them together or edit them to return an output. 

Optional parameters:
Set the aspect ratio for the model (One of `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`).
